fields.description: Semantic fingerprint of the source snapshot policy and archive.
fields.name: source_snapshot_fingerprint

fields.description: Physical SHA-256 of the frozen provider archive.
fields.name: source_archive_sha256

fields.description: One-based row position in the provider occurrence CSV.
fields.name: source_row_number

fields.description: ALA stable record UUID from requested field id.
fields.name: ala_record_id

fields.description: SHA-256 of the normalized semantic row before this field is added.
fields.name: normalized_occurrence_fingerprint

fields.description: Stable pack key only for an exact ALA taxonConceptID crosswalk match.
fields.name: butterflylens_taxon_key

fields.description: Both processed coordinate values are present.
fields.name: has_coordinates

fields.description: Coordinates are finite and within WGS84 latitude/longitude ranges.
fields.name: coordinate_in_wgs84_range

fields.description: ALA spatiallyValid assertion; null only when not supplied.
fields.name: spatially_valid

fields.description: ALA marks coordinates generalised or alreadyGeneralised.
fields.name: coordinates_publicly_generalised

fields.description: Explicit exclusion, coarse-only, or all-configured-resolution state.
fields.name: spatial_aggregation_eligibility

fields.description: ALA-processed event date preserved as supplied by the download.
fields.name: event_date

fields.description: Leading valid four-digit event year when parseable.
fields.name: event_year

fields.description: Declared temporal band; historical is an analytical convention, not a provider type.
fields.name: temporal_evidence_band

fields.description: Publisher-supplied basis of record retained by ALA.
fields.name: raw_basis_of_record

fields.description: Deterministic category distinguishing observations, machine evidence, material, specimens, fossils, and unspecified occurrences.
fields.name: evidence_category

fields.description: ALA-processed per-record licence from the public allowlist.
fields.name: licence

fields.description: Provider rights text retained without reinterpretation.
fields.name: rights

fields.description: ALA contextual IBRA v7 region assertion (cl11185).
fields.name: ibra_region

fields.description: Provider source reference URL or identifier.
fields.name: source_reference

invariants: ala_record_id is unique and rows are sorted by ala_record_id
butterflylens_taxon_key is populated only for an exact ALA taxonConceptID crosswalk match
licence is a member of the frozen public allowlist
provider taxon fields remain provider assertions, not human verification
generalised sensitive coordinates are never promoted beyond coarse-only spatial eligibility
quality_assertions retains ordered ALA assertion codes
